arts.ttl: Emery FINALLY gets his man! Aston Villa sign Chelsea star
arts.sum: Taking to X, Matt Law reports: “Aston Villa have an agreement in place to sign Axel Disasi on loan for the rest of the season from Chelsea. Aston Villa completed a long-awaited transfer from Chelsea in a deal that will delight manager Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Carney Chukwuemeka: Who is Dortmund's newest English starlet?
arts.sum: To cap off his first season of professional football, he came off the bench in the final Premier League game of the season in a 2-1 home win over future club Chelsea at Villa Park. In the 2021/22 season, Chukwuemeka continued to climb the ladder, making his first Premier League start in late August, before featuring in an EFL Cup match away at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi set to join Aston Villa on loan after Tottenham fail to tempt the Chelsea defender for a second time
arts.sum: It is understood that Villa will pay a £5million loan fee to Chelsea. Spurs had agreed a similar deal with the Blues but twice failed to convince Disasi to move to north London.

arts.ttl: Carney Chukwuemeka joins Borussia Dortmund on loan from Chelsea
arts.sum: "Carney is an extremely talented box-to-box player who has made a real impression in the Premier League at a young age. Chukwuemeka came through the youth academy ranks at Villa, before making his Premier League debut at the age of 18.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to sign Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi on loan
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reached an agreement with Premier League rivals Chelsea over a loan move for France international centre-back Axel Disasi (26), according to The Telegraph’s Matt Law. Villa were…

arts.ttl: What Chelsea plan to do with new signing Mathis Amougou after Strasbourg loan suggestions - journalist

arts.ttl: Bobby Zamora reacts as West Ham seal Deadline Day signing
arts.sum: Bobby Zamora has wished Evan Ferguson well after confirming his loan to West Ham on deadline day. The Republic of Ireland international completed his switch... The post Bobby Zamora reacts as West Ham seal Deadline Day signing appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Chelsea signed £20m Arsenal star and player Arsene Wenger was gutted left in January
arts.sum: Chelsea are notorious for making the most of the January transfer window, with The Blues snagging several high-profile signings over the years

arts.ttl: Official: Dortmund take Chelsea midfielder on loan
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have signed Chelsea's Carney Chukwuemeka for the remainder of the 2024/25 campaign.
